meta.purpose: LLM prompt to generate an Astro static page for Steam Deck repair services

constraints.rendering: Static HTML only — zero client-side JavaScript unless explicitly marked as `client:load` island
constraints.styling: Tailwind CSS using semantic design tokens from the provided CSS variables. NEVER use raw color values (no `bg-blue-500`, no `text-white`). Use `bg-primary`, `text-foreground`, `bg-muted`, etc.
constraints.fonts: Inter via Google Fonts, loaded in <head> with `font-display: swap`
constraints.icons: Inline SVG only — no icon library runtime. Copy SVG paths from Lucide (https://lucide.dev). Each icon must have `aria-hidden="true"` and `focusable="false"`.
constraints.images: All `` tags MUST have `alt`, `width`, `height`, and `loading="lazy"` (except hero which uses `loading="eager"`). Use Astro `` component where possible.
constraints.links_internal: Standard `<a href="/path">` — NO client-side router. All internal links must start with `/`.
constraints.links_external: All external `<a>` tags MUST have `target="_blank"` and `rel="noopener noreferrer"`.
constraints.accessibility: All interactive elements must be keyboard-accessible. Use semantic HTML (`<nav>`, `<main>`, `<section>`, `<article>`, `<footer>`). Buttons must have visible focus rings.
constraints.accordions: Use native `<details>` + `<summary>` elements. NO JavaScript accordions.
forbidden: useState, useEffect, or any React hooks
Any content not present in this JSON

page.metaTitle: Steam Deck Repair Winnipeg | Screen & Joystick Fix | Mobile Tech Lab
page.metaDescription: Steam Deck repair in Winnipeg. Screen, joystick drift, battery, SSD upgrade for Steam Deck OLED & LCD models. PC gaming handheld specialists.
page.heroDescription: Steam Deck acting up? Screen cracked, stick drift, or need more storage? We're Winnipeg's PC gaming handheld specialists.

heroImage.alt: Steam Deck repair services in Winnipeg

services.name: Screen Replacement
services.description: Replace cracked LCD or OLED screens on all Steam Deck models.

services.name: Joystick Drift Repair
services.description: Permanent fix for analog stick drift on Steam Deck.

services.name: Battery Replacement
services.description: Restore battery life for extended portable PC gaming.

services.name: SSD Upgrade
services.description: Upgrade to larger NVMe storage—512GB, 1TB, 2TB options.

services.name: Charging Port Repair
services.description: Fix USB-C charging and docking issues.

services.name: Fan Replacement
services.description: Replace noisy or failing cooling fans.

advantage_pillars.title: Steam Deck Specialists
advantage_pillars.description: Winnipeg's PC gaming handheld repair experts.

advantage_pillars.title: OLED & LCD Experts
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repairs for both Steam Deck OLED and LCD models.

advantage_pillars.title: SSD Upgrade Pros
advantage_pillars.description: Storage upgrades with system reinstallation included.

advantage_pillars.title: Warranty on Every Repair
advantage_pillars.description: Screen repair warranties vary by part tier. Lifetime warranty on most other repairs.

model_categories.title: Steam Deck OLED
model_categories.description: Latest OLED model repairs and upgrades.

models_description: We repair all Steam Deck models including OLED and LCD versions, plus storage upgrades.

pricing_micro_copy.costDriver: Steam Deck repair costs depend on the issue and model. Valve provides official troubleshooting documentation.
pricing_micro_copy.priceShock: Steam Deck OLED screen replacements can approach a significant portion of the device's value. iFixit's Steam Deck teardowns highlight Valve's design choices.
pricing_micro_copy.advisory: If the repair cost doesn't make sense, we'll explain alternatives clearly.
pricing_micro_copy.fallback: Your Steam library and saves sync to the cloud, so data loss is rarely a concern.

faqs.question: Can you fix Steam Deck stick drift in Winnipeg?
faqs.answer: Yes! We replace the analog stick modules, usually within 1-2 hours.

faqs.question: Do you upgrade Steam Deck storage?
faqs.answer: Yes, we upgrade to larger NVMe SSDs (up to 2TB).

faqs.question: Can you replace Steam Deck OLED screens?
faqs.answer: Yes, we replace both LCD and OLED screens.

faqs.question: Do you fix noisy Steam Deck fans?
faqs.answer: Yes, fan replacement is a common repair.

faqs.question: How long does Steam Deck repair take?
faqs.answer: Most repairs take 1-2 hours if parts are in stock.

service_area_note: Serving St. Vital, Fort Garry, Garden City, Transcona, and all Winnipeg neighborhoods. Also serving Thompson, MB.

locations.name: St. Vital Centre
locations.address: 1225 St Mary's Rd, Winnipeg, MB R2M 5E5

validation_checklist: Page has exactly ONE <h1> tag matching the `page.h1` field
All services render with inline SVG icons, not an icon library import
All FAQ items use <details>/<summary>, not JS accordions
All external links have target='_blank' rel='noopener noreferrer'
All three JSON-LD blocks are injected in <head>
No React, Preact, or JSX runtime in the build output
Hero image has loading='eager'; all other images have loading='lazy'
Page renders fully without JavaScript enabled
All color classes use Tailwind semantic tokens (bg-primary, text-foreground, etc.)
Phone links use tel: protocol; SMS links use sms: protocol
Section IDs match table_of_contents entries for anchor navigation
No placeholder content — every string comes from this JSON
